DEPT#1,PROTEM JUDGE PAUL PERDUE; E. ESTACIO, CLERK C/C FOR SETT CONF. ATTY MICHAEL ROSSOFF APPEARING FOR PLTF. DEFT ALLISON JORDAM-LLAMAS PRESENT & APPEARING IN PRO PER. NO SETTLEMENT REACHED

#1 JUDGE:DONNA LITTLE; S.SAWYER/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL MICHAEL ROSSOFF, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED. JUDGMENT PURS. TO STIP READ INTO THE RECORD AND SIGNED BY DEFT IN OPEN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JORDAN-LLAMAS, ALISON  A.K.A. ALLISON LLAMAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1871-B PALOU AVE, S.F., STAYED UNTIL JUL-31-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAY. NO OTHER PERSON HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PLTF. PERSONAL PROPERTY DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ANY AND ALL CLAIMS. DEFT TO ALLOW REPAIRS TO BE MADE ON 24 HRS WRITTEN NOTICE. DEFT COMPLIES PLTF VACATE JUDGMENT & FILE DISMISSAL.
